emergency_definition: fire panel alarm on monitored site
access control lockout at critical facility
full camera outage at secured property

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Reassure critical priority and response team calls back within 8 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules: Capture account ID and issue summary, then queue for support specialist callback

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: We are still attempting a secure handoff and your case is in active review

integration_constraints: Brivo and Alarm.com only; no remote unlock commands from voice agent
after_hours_flow_summary: Confirm emergency status, transfer emergency to overnight monitoring desk, otherwise take details for next-day team
